system.description:
LEVEL 3

Haunted. When an Afflicted creature dies, apply all of their Afflictions to another enemy within Reach 8 of them.

LEVEL 7

Spitecurse. When you would deal damage to an Afflicted creature with a Hexbinder spell, you may instead transfer that damage to another Afflicted creature.

LEVEL 11

Cursespitter. Your Hex range increases and you can apply Afflictions through it.

LEVEL 15

Hexcaster. Your spells ignore Affliction immunities and resistances.
